message:
feat(freeze): Add apply opcode Zig support

Convert apply opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode implements func.apply(this, argsArray).

Stack effect: [func, this, argsArray] -> [result]

Implementation:
- Pops args_array, this_obj, and func from stack
- Gets length property from args array
- Dynamically allocates argv array if argc > 0
- Extracts each argument from args array
- Frees args array after extraction
- Calls JS_Call with extracted arguments
- Frees func, this_obj, and all argv elements
- Frees dynamically allocated argv
- Returns exception if call fails
- Pushes result to stack
- In Zig: uses optional pointer for argv, while loop, capture syntax
- In C: uses NULL pointer, for loop, direct conditionals
